scripts.test: sh -c 'if find src -type f \( -name "*.test.ts" -o -name "*.test.tsx" -o -name "*.test.js" -o -name "*.test.jsx" -o -name "*.spec.ts" -o -name "*.spec.tsx" -o -name "*.spec.js" -o -name "*.spec.jsx" \) | grep -q .; then command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "bun is required to run @hypr/stripe tests" >&2; exit 1; }; bun test --pass-with-no-tests; else node --test; fi'
